decks.notes: This Selesnya Aggro deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub, Elvish Mystic, and Llanowar Elves to quickly build a threatening board presence. Cards like Thalia, Guardian of Thraben and Enduring Innocence disrupt opponents' plans while Archon of Emeria slows down their plays. Collected Company helps to quickly refill the board with creatures. Skyclave Apparition and Elspeth, Storm Slayer provide removal options, while The Wandering Emperor and Ouroboroid offer resilience and additional threats. Overall, this deck focuses on tempo and aggression to secure victory.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a mix of counterspells, removal, and card draw. The deck includes a variety of effects to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while also ensuring card advantage through spells like Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive. The inclusion of Kaheera, the Orphanguard as a companion provides additional value and synergy with the deck's creature base. Overall, the deck aims to outlast the opponent and establish dominance through consistent control and resource management.

This UW Control deck focuses on using a companion creature, Yorion, Sky Nomad, to increase card advantage and overall control over the game. The deck includes a variety of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw options to maintain control of the board and outvalue the opponent. The deck also utilizes cards like The Wandering Emperor and Hall of Storm Giants to win the game through alternate win conditions. Ultimately, the deck aims to outlast the opponent through resource management and strategic plays.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's moves and disrupting their strategy using a combination of counterspells, removal, and card draw. It aims to establish board control and protect its own powerful threats, such as Elspeth, Storm Slayer and Teferi, Hero of Dominaria. It also includes a companion, Kaheera, the Orphanguard, to provide additional synergy with the deck's creatures. By maintaining tempo and out-valuing the opponent, the deck seeks to dictate the pace of the game and secure victory through attrition and overwhelming card advantage.

The deck focuses on establishing a strong board presence by utilizing cards like Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II to create a powerful combo. It also incorporates resource denial and disruption through cards like Thoughtseize and Cache Grab. Control elements are present with Bitter Triumph and Witherbloom Command to manage the battlefield. The mana base is optimized to support the deck's strategy efficiently. Overall, the deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of synergy, disruption, and aggressive plays to secure victory.

The main idea of this deck is to aggressively disrupt your opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress while applying pressure with efficient threats like Bonecrusher Giant and Bloodtithe Harvester. Fable of the Mirror-Breaker can snowball the game in your favor, and cards like Fatal Push and Abrade provide removal options. Sheoldred, the Apocalypse can close out games quickly, while Kroxa, Titan of Death's Hunger and Strategic Betrayal offer additional ways to disrupt your opponent's plans. Overall, this deck aims to control the game and win through aggressive plays and consistent disruption.

This Rakdos Aggro deck focuses on fast, aggressive gameplay with a mix of creatures and spells to disrupt your opponent's strategy while dealing consistent damage. It utilizes powerful cards like Bloodtithe Harvester, Bonecrusher Giant, and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse to pressure the opponent and control the board. The deck also includes disruption tools like Duress and Thoughtseize to interrupt the opponent's game plan. With efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrade, as well as a versatile finisher in Kroxa, Titan of Death's Hunger, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents quickly and decisively.

The deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategies through a combination of removal spells and hand disruption. It also aims to control the board with powerful creatures like Graveyard Trespasser and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. The mana base is designed to consistently hit the necessary colors and to provide flexibility with lands like Mutavault and Boseiju, Who Endures. Overall, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent by efficiently handling threats while establishing a steady stream of card advantage and board presence.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by disrupting your opponent's strategy with cards like Thoughtseize and Duress, while also having removal spells like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay to deal with threats on the board. The deck also utilizes mana acceleration with Llanowar Elves and Mutavault to quickly cast powerful creatures like Graveyard Trespasser and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse. The inclusion of cards like Culling Ritual and Tear Asunder allows for additional disruption and flexibility in dealing with various types of threats.

This deck focuses on using the Greasefang Parhelion combo to quickly generate tokens and overwhelm the opponent. By combining cards like Monument to Endurance and Fleeting Spirit with Greasefang, Okiba Boss and Parhelion II, the deck is able to create a powerful board presence and put pressure on the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's board and disrupt their game plan. With a mix of aggressive creatures and strong removal spells, this deck aims to win through a fast and efficient combo strategy.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to utilize cheap spells and creatures to deal quick damage to the opponent while maintaining card advantage through card draw and interaction spells. The deck aims to be aggressive, using cards like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage to pressure the opponent early on, while also generating value with cards like Consider and Stormchaser's Talent. With a mix of burn spells, cheap creatures, and card draw, this deck seeks to overwhelm the opponent quickly before they have a chance to stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence and dealing damage efficiently to the opponent. It utilizes low-cost spells and creatures to generate card advantage, tempo, and burn damage. The key strategy is to apply pressure early with evasive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Soul-Scar Mage, while controlling the board with removal spells like Reckless Rage and Fiery Impulse. The deck aims to close out the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize, using cards like Cori-Steel Cutter and Vivi Ornitier to push through the final points of damage.

This deck focuses on utilizing sacrifice synergy with cards like Witch's Oven and Cauldron Familiar to generate value and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The aim is to aggressively control the board by sacrificing creatures, gaining incremental advantage, and pressuring the opponent with a mix of efficient threats and removal spells. The inclusion of Ygra, Eater of All and Scavenger's Talent adds a unique twist by allowing for graveyard recursion and additional card advantage. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature aggression and disruptive spells.

The deck focuses on aggressive plays using cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to disrupt the opponent's strategy while deploying threats like Bonecrusher Giant and Kroxa, Titan of Death's Hunger. Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provides card advantage and Sheoldred, the Apocalypse is a powerful finisher. The deck also includes removal spells like Abrade to deal with opposing threats. The mana base is built around efficiently casting the powerful Rakdos cards, with lands like Blood Crypt and Blackcleave Cliffs providing the necessary colors. Overall, the deck aims to apply early pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure a quick victory.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on utilizing cards like Bishop of Wings, Resplendent Angel, and Righteous Valkyrie to quickly build a strong board presence and put pressure on the opponent. With a mix of angels and elves, the deck aims to control the battlefield with cards like Skyclave Apparition and Collected Company while generating value from lifegain effects. The mana base is optimized for consistency and speed, allowing the deck to efficiently cast its powerful threats and overwhelm the opponent with a relentless aggressive strategy.

The deck focuses on using Niv-Mizzet Reborn as a key card to control the game, with a mix of multicolored spells and powerful companions like Yorion, Sky Nomad. The strategy involves ramping up with mana dorks like Sylvan Caryatid and utilizing versatile spells like Bring to Light to answer threats against the opponent. With a mix of removal spells, card draw, and powerful creatures like Omnath, Locus of Creation, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and establish board control to ultimately secure victory.
